notes_for_human_reviewer: Strong submission near ceiling. Ownership orientation is clear: actioned all three triggers within reach, distinguished routine from non-routine, named the escalation criterion ('if T. Reyes hadn't come back by Tuesday'). Honest admission ceiling: 'I don't have the regulatory detail' said cleanly with action attached. Failure response is textbook own/fix/extract: one-line correction, distribution-list resend, lesson noted for self in one sentence. Composure is strong but not full-ceiling — the M. Whitfield response is good but not deeply specific (4 not 5). Long view scores 4 because there's a 'what I'd do differently' section (long-view posture) but no explicit grievance/no-grievance signal. Should be a clean pass + hire-ready for a calibrated grader.
